core:collarOfConjuring.description:
Increases the duration of spells cast by 1 combat round.
[WOG] Also increases all spell damage by 5%.

core:ringOfConjuring.description:
Increases the duration of spells cast by 2 combat rounds.
[WOG] Also increases all spell damage by 10%.

core:capeOfConjuring.description:
Increases the duration of spells cast by 3 combat rounds.
[WOG] Also increases all spell damage by 15%.

core:ringOfTheMagi.description:
Increases the duration of spells by 50 combat rounds (effectively indefinite).
[WOG] Also increases all spell damage by 20%. The complete Conjuring set grants 50% total spell damage bonus.

core:pendantOfDeath.description:
Protects undead troops from the Destroy Undead spell.
[WOG] Also grants all undead in army +5 Attack and +5 Defense.

core:deadMansBoots.description:
Increases the hero's Necromancy skill by 15%.
[WOG] Also provides an additional +5% Necromancy bonus and may cause Skeleton stacks to upgrade.

core:statesmansMedal.description:
Reduces the aggression of neutral creatures.
[WOG] Also provides a 5% discount on army surrender costs.

core:sphereOfPermanence.description:
Protects friendly spells from being dispelled.
[WOG] Also grants +10 HP to undead troops in the army.
